name: Sveriges Television AB
notes:
-----------------------------------------
SVT AS201641 Peering Policy
-----------------------------------------

- SVT has a selective peering policy. We evaluate peers based on traffic volumes and connectivity among other things.
- Peering requests should be sent to peering@svt.se containing the following information:

 * Company name
 * AS-Name
 * AS-Number/AS-macro
 * Contact information
 * PeeringDB record
 * Estimated traffic volume


Technical

- Only send traffic destined for the prefixes we announce (do not try to use us as transit for other destinations).
- Only announce publicly routable prefixes and as-numbers delegated by an RIR.


Connected IXPs

- SVT AS201641 is connected to the following IXPs:

 * Netnod Stockholm (20Gbps)


PNIs

- SVT prefers PNIs if the traffic volume is higher than 10Gbps sustained over time.
